creator: gnikl@justmail.de
text:
(In reply to Charlie Li from comment #17)
> We're back to autotools so the old symbol versioning behaviour should return.
Thank you! The missing symbol versions were a major PITA breaking eg. chromium for me. I didn't notice immediately since I am using SeaMonkey most of the time. libxml2 broken was surprising and I was tempted to revert to the previous version. Fortunately the issue was already fixed, so thanks again.

FWIW, this is the second time that switching build system causes pain. AFAIR, it was freetype2 switching to cmake which removed the freetype-config script.
